description: Style NoteTo all fashion forward guys - your search is over! Jack & Jones is now here on myntra, just waiting to provide you with all the stylish gear you need to create your own JJ look. In all kinds of colours and with cool, quirky prints, grab a tee or two to keep your casual wardrobe fresh and original. If you don't want to have to work hard to look great, then put yourself in Jack and Jones' capable hands... they're there to guarantee you'll turn heads for all the right reasons!Product DetailsOrange T-shirt, has a round neck, short sleeves with contrast panelling, flock print and branding on the frontMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warm in a gentle cycle, using a mild detergentWarm iron Size and FitTight FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
